blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,342 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 10".
